name: neotherapper-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Georgios Pilitsoglou — naming, API mapping, blog drafting, and interactive learning.

plugins.name: namesmith
plugins.description: Find the right name for your project — brand interview, AI generation across 8 archetypes, live domain availability + pricing via Cloudflare or Porkbun.

plugins.name: beacon
plugins.description: Map any site's API surface — systematically.

plugins.name: draftloom
plugins.description: AI-powered blog post drafting. Write in your voice, optimised for virality.

plugins.name: visual-kit
plugins.description: Shared local visual rendering for Claude Code plugins. Provides the vk-* component library, HTTP server, and SurfaceSpec JSON contract.

plugins.name: paidagogos
plugins.description: Structured AI-powered lessons for any topic, rendered in a local visual browser UI.

plugins.name: reframe
plugins.description: Turn any live site into a purpose-driven redesign brief for Claude Design.

plugins.name: idea-forge
plugins.description: Two-stage business idea pipeline: surface opportunity gaps and evaluate viability.

plugins.name: aegis
plugins.description: Passive vulnerability-coverage for your own sites — fingerprint → known-CVE + misconfig report.
